item.description:

25
26 Man Tax: Adam Demos
So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc.
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: 27 nice and wholesome things to brighten your day, vol 294
item.description:
My cat is 15 years old and has graduated high school, college, and graduate school with me. ~u/lovekaleah
He is in the hood of an amauti and wearing a harness.
He was so brave and tired after a long evening and ready to go home and rest. Quana for being such a good boy Oliver!

item.dc:creator: kendottack

item.title: I Reached Legendary
item.description: This weekend I hit Legendary on Imgur. That's a ridiculous sentence to type out... It means I've accumulated over 1,000,000 Imgur points. (Imgurnary Points?) Which means one of two things: - I've spent way too much time on this website. - You've all enabled me for far too long. It's both isn't it? I've spent over a decade sharing my life, my hobbies, my costumes, my victories, my failures, and occasionally my ability to make complete strangers ask questions about themselves they weren't prepared to answer... Through all of it, this community kept showing up... Even as Imgur has had it's own ups and downs as a place for us all. And even though Imgur has changed a lot over the years... So have I. I've gone from posting cosplay photos, to MARRYING Imgur, to suddenly documenting an entire transition and having conversations I never imagined I'd be having when I first made an account. Thank you to everyone who ever left a comment, upvoted a post, shared a laugh, disagreed respectfully, supported my work, or simply followed along. 1,000,000 points is a cool milestone. But every single one of you behind those points is what actually matters to me. Thanks for the ride, Imgur ? AlsoAshley
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley
sindail

item.title: we ain't found Shit yet - Happy 70 Birthday Tim Russ
item.description: also Known as Commander Tuvok in Star Trek Voyager.
item.dc:creator: Mapconsuela

item.description: I came out to my parents 8 years ago. After five years of them misgendering me and mourning 'the son they'd lost' I went no contact. Every conversation with them was emotionally like trying to hug knives. I'm happy for all the people out there who still have dads. I miss mine so much. I still love him but I can't trust my parents not to hurt me in the deepest ways. Anyway, just needed to rant, get it off my chest to my usersub peeps.
item.dc:creator: ThatOtherGirlYouKnow

Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos

item.title: GovBrief Today #507
item.description: JD Vance finally sat down with Iranian leaders in a Swiss resort on Sunday to end a war his own boss spent the day threatening to restart. The talks were set for Friday and called off when Israeli strikes on Lebanon put the ceasefire back in doubt, and Vance boarded the plane only once a truce held. He told the Iranian negotiators the two countries could turn over a new leaf, and called the progress real. Then Donald Trump went on Truth Social and warned that the United States would "hit Iran very hard again," and harder this time, unless Tehran reined in the proxies he blames for the fighting in Lebanon. Iran's delegation filed a formal protest, saying the president's threats violated the same agreement his vice president had flown there to save. Iran has no reason to trust America's vice president and his promises of peace. The biggest threat to this ceasefire is not at the table in Switzerland. He sits in Washington. Vance can promise a fresh start. The president can erase it with a single post. I've emailed 7,908 stories over 507 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your email address at govbrief.today and I will. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/ Today's full brief: https://go.govbrief.today/260621-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-starmer-resign [2] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-june22 [3] https://go.govbrief.today/gop-dark-pacs [4] https://go.govbrief.today/gabbard-expose [5] https://go.govbrief.today/logan-near-collision [6] https://go.govbrief.today/pool-inspected [7] https://go.govbrief.today/gallego-funds Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Happy Fathers day
item.description: My wife and I met on imgur. Tonight is the 9 year anniversary we met after I slid into her DMs. 1900 miles apart. Few and plane flights back and forth we married 11 months later. 8 years married. Player 3 entered the game late last November. Never seen my dad so happy has when he became a grandpa. He passed away nearly two months ago and today is a bittersweet day. Mostly sweet because baby is so amazing!!
item.dc:creator: CakeIsALie227

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1725 (cantaloupe mimicry)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
Hahahahahaha
I could go for a cheese cantaloupe right now
Decided this didn't quite fit for one of my Bronze-age dumps and so here it sits.
I watched a Raven abscond with a spicy hot chicken wing the other day at work, it was fantastic. I even got some photos, I promise I'll post them eventually.
The mnemonic for the song of the Red-eyed Vireo is "Here I am! Where are you? See me! Up here!"
Love the guy who said "if LLMs are intelligent and sapient, so is Age of Empires II"
He really would have.
If it makes me just as bad and evil as them, then I will put my case before God at the final judgment and spit in God's face.
Made this meme for Pippin's hatchday last month. He's now 6!
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Pippin." ___ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett
